name: Hayden Orpheum
vibe: Step into the 1930s with a functioning Wurlitzer pipe organ, heritage interiors, and classic film screenings. The Orpheum is a love letter to the golden age of cinema.
whyGo: For the pre-show Wurlitzer organ performance — nowhere else in Sydney does this.
bestFor: Film buffs, architecture lovers, date night with character
tonightSpecial: Wurlitzer organ plays before every evening session

name: The Ritz Cinema
vibe: A beautifully restored 1937 Art Deco cinema with a cozy community atmosphere. The Ritz serves up a curated mix of arthouse, foreign, and select mainstream films.
whyGo: Heritage Art Deco charm meets carefully curated programming — feels like a secret locals know.
bestFor: Arthouse fans, couples who want charm without pretension
tonightSpecial: Licensed bar in the foyer — grab a wine before the film

name: Golden Age Cinema & Bar
vibe: Hidden in a heritage-listed Paramount Pictures building, Golden Age pairs independent cinema with a dimly-lit cocktail bar. The perfect date-night destination.
whyGo: The only cinema in Sydney where you can sip a Negroni while watching an indie gem.
bestFor: Date night, creative types, anyone who wants more than just a movie
tonightSpecial: Late-night sessions + cocktail bar open till midnight

name: Palace Verona
vibe: A boutique arthouse cinema in the heart of Paddington. Palace Verona showcases the best of independent, foreign, and festival films in an intimate setting.
whyGo: Palace's festival programming is unmatched — if there's a film fest on, this is where you want to be.
bestFor: Festival chasers, foreign film lovers, Paddington locals
tonightSpecial: French Film Festival screenings with Q&A sessions

name: Event Cinemas George St
vibe: The flagship Event Cinemas location in the heart of the CBD. IMAX screens, Dolby Atmos, Gold Class lounges — everything you need for the latest Hollywood releases.
whyGo: IMAX with laser projection — if you're seeing a blockbuster, see it here or don't bother.
bestFor: Blockbuster fans, groups, anyone who wants the biggest screen possible
tonightSpecial: IMAX sessions available for latest releases

name: HOYTS Broadway
vibe: HOYTS Broadway delivers the full blockbuster experience with Xtreme Screen, recliner seating, and the latest in projection technology. Perfect for big-screen spectacles.
whyGo: Luxury recliners that actually recline flat — the comfiest way to watch a film in Sydney.
tonightSpecial: Xtreme Screen sessions with reserved luxury recliners
